The AI threat research text describes a backdoor attack mechanism and its impact on AI models. A backdoor attack is an attempt to manipulate an AI model's behavior by introducing a malicious pattern or trigger that is not present in the original training data. The attack success rate is the ratio of instances where the model correctly predicts the target, which is a measure of the attack's effectiveness.
